refnamediv.refpurpose: Adds element of a TopoGeometry to the definition of another TopoGeometry.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Adds the elements of a to the definition of another TopoGeometry, possibly changing its cached type (type attribute) to a collection, if needed to hold all elements in the source object.
The two TopoGeometry objects need be defined against the *same* topology and, if hierarchically defined, need be composed by elements of the same child layer.

refsection.title: Examples
